data.content: Plan approved. It matches the current repo layout: loom-cli is a single binary crate, install.sh already uses redirect-based latest asset URLs, and docs/releasing.md confirms the supported release matrix is x86_64-unknown-linux-musl, aarch64-unknown-linux-musl, and aarch64-apple-darwin. The plan covers CLI surface, redirect-based latest resolution to avoid GitHub API rate limits, checksum verification, atomic binary replacement, installer alignment, docs, and test coverage. Main implementation caution is test isolation for self-update flows so integration tests should run against a copied binary or stubbed install path rather than mutating target/debug/loom in place.
